title: Kilo's PVP pack
description: This is a vanilla inspired PVP pack with most asked for features
body:
## **This is a vanilla inspired PVP pack that includes most key features like:**

**• No pumpkin blur**

 **• Shorter, better-looking swords**

 **• Battle Axes**

 **• Low Fire and Shield**

 **• Minimal explosion particles**

 **• Compact totems and pop particles**

 **• Extra custom textures like gaps and ender-pearls all waiting for u!**

 Perfect for players who like the vanilla feel and look whilst also changing up key features for PVP!!

 **Also be sure join our discord!!**
